recommendations.title: Update spec status fields from Draft to Complete
recommendations.description: Specs 001-005 have Status: Draft and spec 006 has Status: Backfilled, but all requirements are fully implemented. Update to Complete/Implemented.

recommendations.title: Remove backfill notice from spec 006
recommendations.description: Spec 006-log-handler contains a Backfill Notice that is no longer needed since the spec has been validated against implementation.
